name: io.github.basit-khan-abdul/vehicle-safety-mcp
title: Vehicle Safety (NHTSA)
description: NHTSA vehicle safety data for Claude: VIN decoding, recalls, crash-test ratings, and complaints.

environmentVariables.name: NHTSA_CONNECT_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Connection timeout in seconds for NHTSA API calls.

environmentVariables.name: NHTSA_READ_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Response read timeout in seconds for NHTSA API calls.

environmentVariables.name: NHTSA_MAX_ATTEMPTS
environmentVariables.description: Total attempts per request (1 disables retry).

environmentVariables.name: NHTSA_BACKOFF_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base backoff in seconds before jitter is applied.

environmentVariables.name: NHTSA_BACKOFF_CAP
environmentVariables.description: Maximum backoff in seconds for any single retry.
